title: GeneralMaterialTakeoff
description: GeneralMaterialTakeoff: Defines the make up of an object through a list of Materials and their corresponding quantities corresponding to each material.

MaterialTakeoffItems.description: List of the the materials with corresponding qunatities relevant to the particular material.
